title: pleopeltis cochlearis
intro: Pleopeltis cochlearis, also known as the hanging spleenwort, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pleopeltis cochlearis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
